document.title: KP1_CTS_零部件技术规范
document.english_title: Component Technical Specification (CTS) - Fuel supply line
document.primary_function: Transport Fuel from Fuel Tank to Engine

critical_technical_requirements.requirement: Metallic pipe internal nickel plate treatment
Protection caps on all hose extremities
critical_technical_requirements.exceptions: Can be eliminated only with specific agreement from Plant UTE and STELLANTIS Quality dept

requirements.requirement: Internal nickel plate treatment on metallic pipes
All materials consistent to STELLANTIS CS-9003
Materials should be recyclable as much as possible
Marking on Fuel and Vapor Lines
VOC, Odor and Prohibited Substances requirements
Material data sheet via IMDS system
requirements.note: Production approval only after STELLANTIS receives material data

requirements.requirement: Visual inspection standards
Dimensional tolerance compliance
Material property verification
Electrical property compliance
Fuel bundle and fuel system jumpers compliance
Quick connector functionality
Rubber o-rings seals compliance
Steel pipes compliance
EC (European Community) compliance
ECE (Economic Commission Europe) compliance
Long-term performance under operating conditions
Protection caps on all hose extremities

details.exception: Can be eliminated only with specific agreement with Plant UTE and STELLANTIS Quality dept
details.design_criteria: Caps must be shaped according to specific criteria
details.coordination: Transport conditions must be shared with Manufacturing Engineering dept

requirements.requirement: Supplier must provide one DV plan per component
Supplier must provide one PV (AQF) plan per component

requirements.guideline: All STELLANTIS specification tests must be listed
requirements.note: All tests must be present, even if not planned

requirements.action: Write reason in NOTE column and color line grey
If extending tests from DV, document in NOTE column and color grey
Mandatory to fill requalification tests column

requirements.requirement: Provide DV and PV plans for complement components

primary_specification.title: Fuel bundle and fuel system jumpers
primary_specification.reference: Annex A contains detailed test matrix

metals.title: Electrowelded steel pipes for fuel circuits

protective_sleeves.title: Electrical system insulating components wiring harness protection sleeves

adhesives_tapes.title: Pressure-sensitive adhesive labels for vehicle interior

environmental_compliance.title: Supplier Requirements for Vehicle and Service Parts: Restricted and Prohibited Substances
Recycling markings for plastic, composite and elastomer components
Recyclability and recoverability of a vehicle
VOC, Odor and Prohibited Substances Requirements
I.M.D.S. system for material recyclability
environmental_compliance.requirement: Material data sheets mandatory for production approval

quality_and_process.title: Supplier alphanumeric code marking - indications on drawing
Procedure for the individuation of integration level of product

marking_and_identification.title: Motor Vehicle Part Marking Procedure - sol. F / MOPAR LOGO

cad_and_drawing.title: CAD drawings - Rules for 3DA documentation definition
New drawing title block – definitions and completion rules
CAD drawings types and sides of lines and characters
TcAE system and CAD part management
CAD drawings – Self-certification of the quality of the CAD parts
CAD drawings – Self-certification of graphs quality (E&D)
Geometric dimensioning and tolerancing practices (ASME addendum)

package_specification.title: STELLANTIS Package Specification
package_specification.requirement: All CAD model changes must be fully compliant

nickel_plating_requirement.description: Internal nickel plating treatment for metallic tubes
nickel_plating_requirement.requirement_text: Metallic pipe is required internal nickel plate treatment

protection_cap_requirements.description: Protection caps for fuel line hose extremities
protection_cap_requirements.requirement: Protection caps are requested on all hose extremities (plastic, rubber or metal)

exceptions.condition: Only with specific agreement with Plant UTE and STELLANTIS Quality dept

design_requirements.storage: Transport conditions of the new type of component storage have to be shared with Manufacturing Engineering dept
design_requirements.shape: Protection caps have to be shaped according to following criteria
design_requirements.note: Specific design criteria referenced but details in design drawings section

cad_standards.requirement: CAD drawing standard has to be fully compliant with requirements of §2.4.3

package_specification.requirement: All changes to the CAD model allowed to suppliers regarding Fuel and Vapor Lines geometry have to be fully compliant
package_specification.supplier_responsibility: Must be updated and share STELLANTIS Package Team Requirements through all phases

functionality.requirement: All parts of Fuel and Vapor Lines have to be designed by Supplier properly in order to guarantee proper functionality of Fuel and Vapor Lines assembly

compliance.requirement: All materials must be consistent to STELLANTIS CS-9003

recyclability.requirement: Materials used in Fuel and Vapor Lines should be recyclable as much as possible
recyclability.action: Point out eventual criticalities to Material dept

marking.requirement: Marking on the Fuel and Vapor Lines must be consistent to STELLANTIS 07416

imds_system.requirement: Supplier must use the IMDS system for materials recyclability
imds_system.approval: Production approval will be given only after STELLANTIS has received material data sheet via IMDS system

alternatives.process: Alternative materials will be evaluated by STELLANTIS during the sourcing process
alternatives.documentation: Supplier must provide list of all materials according STELLANTIS guidelines

order_of_precedence.description: STELLANTIS specifications (higher requirements apply in conflict)
Government laws and regulations (unless specific exemption obtained)

documentation.when: For any deviations from target mainstream solution
